name: Kentucky Praline Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl or roaster, mix the popped popcorn and chopped pecans.
2. In a small saucepan, combine the butter and brown sugar. Heat over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth.
3. Pour the melted butter and brown sugar mixture over the popcorn and pecan mixture in the large bowl or roaster.
4. Stir well to coat all pieces evenly with the caramel mixture.
5. Serve immediately, as this recipe makes 4 quarts of coated popcorn.
